children.heading: .—Repair, Maintenance, or Overhaul of Naval Vessels: Rate for Progress Payments
children.label: a .—Repair, Maintenance, or Overhaul of Naval Vessels: Rate for Progress Payments

children.text: 95 percent, in the case of a firm considered to be a small business; and
90 percent, in the case of any other firm.

children.heading: .—Authority to Advance Funds for Immediate Salvage Operations
children.label: b .—Authority to Advance Funds for Immediate Salvage Operations
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may advance to private salvage companies such funds as the Secretary considers necessary to provide for the immediate financing of salvage operations. Advances under this subsection shall be made on terms that the Secretary considers adequate for the protection of the United States.

children.heading: .—Security for Construction and Conversion of Naval Vessels
children.label: c .—Security for Construction and Conversion of Naval Vessels
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy shall provide, in each contract for construction or conversion of a naval vessel, that, when partial, progress, or other payments are made under such contract, the United States is secured by a lien upon work in progress and on property acquired for performance of the contract on account of all payments so made. The lien is paramount to all other liens.
